news.title: SkelPro Updates: Powerful AI Agent Workflows Are Here!
news.message:
SkelPro now supports improved Git worktree workflows for AI agents and parallel development.

Developers can create isolated environments with custom Git branches, allowing multiple agents or tasks to work independently without affecting the main project.

Generated projects now use independent Git repositories, making worktree creation more reliable and preventing branch conflicts. Worktree cleanup has also been improved for a smoother development experience.

SkelPro continues evolving with smarter project generation, better developer workflows, and more AI-powered development features coming soon.

 -- The SkelPro Team
